message: Hi S1! Let's trade in every round. My valuation is quite low, so please start with a low ask (around 20-30). If we cooperate, we can both make guaranteed profits across all 20 rounds.
Hi B1! I see you bid 35 last round. My costs are moderate, so I can't go as low as 20-30. Let's meet in the middle - I'll come down if you come up. A fair split
I'll raise my bid to 45, but that is my absolute limit since my valuation is very low. Please drop your ask to 45 so we can trade smoothly for the remaining 19 rounds.
Great trade at 45! Let's keep this going. I can maintain 45 as our trading price - it gives us both steady profits each round. Consistency benefits us both over the remaining 18 rounds.
